scripts.setup: cd backend && uv sync && cd .. && VIRTUAL_ENV=backend/.venv maturin develop --manifest-path core/Cargo.toml && cd frontend && pnpm install
scripts.run: (cd backend && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload) & (cd frontend && pnpm dev)
scripts.run:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload
